title: Nuit De La Glisse: Imagine: Life Spent on the Edge
original_title: Imagine: Life Spent on the Edge
overview: Specially shot for the big screen, IMAGINE: LIFE SPENT ON THE EDGE takes you to the heart of the action of extreme surfing, skiing, snowboarding, wingsuit flying, speed riding and more, featuring the world’s best riders in the most breathtaking landscapes.

trailers.title: IMAGINE: first ever wingsuit flying above skiers

en.title: IMAGINE: first ever wingsuit flying above skiers
